document1: Z_Brand Z_Model is a robot vacuum and mop designed for everyday floor care. It uses LiDAR navigation to create accurate room maps, supports multi-floor mapping, and cleans in neat rows. With up to 5000Pa suction, it handles dust, pet hair, and crumbs on hard floors and carpets. The included auto-empty dock reduces manual bin emptying, while the battery provides up to 180 minutes of runtime per charge. Users can schedule cleaning, set no-go zones, and start jobs through the mobile app or with voice assistants.
document2: The Z_Brand Z_Model combines strong vacuum performance with convenient smart-home features. Its LiDAR-based mapping system helps it navigate efficiently, save multiple floor plans, and avoid missed spots. The robot offers up to 5000Pa suction with automatic carpet boost, plus a built-in mopping function for light wet cleaning on sealed hard floors. An auto-empty dock keeps maintenance low, and the battery lasts up to 180 minutes in standard mode. App controls include room-specific cleaning, scheduling, no-go zones, and cleaning history.
document3: For buyers who want a hands-off cleaning routine, the Z_Brand Z_Model focuses on automation and consistent coverage. The robot vacuum uses LiDAR navigation for precise mapping and supports selective room cleaning, multi-floor maps, and virtual boundaries. Up to 5000Pa suction helps pick up pet hair, fine dust, and larger debris, while carpet boost increases power when rugs are detected. It also includes a mopping feature for routine hard-floor maintenance. With an auto-empty dock and up to 180 minutes of runtime, it is built for convenient daily use.
document4: Z_Brand Z_Model is a practical robot vacuum for homes with mixed flooring. It vacuums and mops, uses LiDAR navigation for efficient path planning, and stores multi-floor maps for easier cleaning across different levels. Suction reaches up to 5000Pa, making it suitable for dust, crumbs, and pet hair, and carpet boost activates on rugs. The self-emptying dock helps reduce upkeep, and the robot runs for up to 180 minutes before recharging. Through the app or voice control, users can schedule sessions, target specific rooms, and set no-go zones.
